name: Cantonese Sweet & Sour Chicken
recipeIngredient: 5 Green onions and tops, thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut chicken into 1-inch pieces.
2. Combine the cornstarch, soy sauce, ginger root, and Mandarin oranges in a bowl; let stand for 15 minutes.
3. Reserve 1/4 cup of the orange syrup. Drain the mandarin oranges.
4. Blend the reserved syrup with the sweet & sour sauce.
5. Heat 1 tablespoon oil in a hot wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
6. Add the chicken and stir-fry for 2 minutes; remove from the pan and set aside.
7. Heat the remaining tablespoon of oil in the same pan.
8. Add snow peas and stir-fry for 1 minute.
9. Add green onions and stir-fry for 30 seconds longer.
10. Return the chicken to the pan. Stir in the cashews and sauce mixture; cook, stirring, until all ingredients are coated in sauce.
11. Gently stir in the mandarin oranges and heat through.
